title: An application of U/Th-series radiotracers to study groundwater transport processes in the surficial and Upper Floridan Aquifer System in central Florida, USA
description: SpeakForWater Episode 13: An application of U/Th-series radiotracers to study groundwater transport processes in the surficial and Upper Floridan Aquifer System in central Florida, USA. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
